name: Arizer Cyclone Bowl for Desktop Vaporizer
summary: The Arizer Glass Cyclone Bowl is specially designed for use with the XQ2, Extreme Q, and V-Tower vaporisers.
description: The Arizer Glass Cyclone Bowl is specially designed for use with the XQ2, Extreme Q, and V-Tower vaporisers. Crafted with care and using only the finest quality food-grade glass, each bowl is accompanied by a perfectly fitting screen disc. Experience exceptional heating distribution while vaping with the Arizer Cyclone Bowl. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
